advice.healer: Spot heal late movers and prepare for tank hits in the same trash pulls.
advice.dps: Do not finish a cast inside Dark Rupture; sidestep and continue.

advice.generic: Frost Breath is a cone/frontal aimed at a player; sidestep the cone and avoid standing in front of the drake.
advice.tank: Face the drake away from the party when possible and be ready for frost-enhanced melees.
advice.healer: Watch random targets if the cone clips them during other trash damage.
advice.dps: Do not stand in front; if targeted, move out of the cone path.

advice.generic: Interrupt Arcane Bolt whenever possible; treat missed casts as preventable pressure rather than normal healer load.
advice.healer: Prepare recovery if the cast goes through, but the main answer is prevention.
advice.dps: Hold or assign interrupts so this cast does not complete.

advice.generic: Phase Dash creates the circle used to clear Void Bombs; aim it through multiple bombs while avoiding allies.
advice.tank: Stack boss and pets so Phase Dash clears bombs without dragging pets away from cleave.
advice.healer: Top the dash target and group before Overload resolves.
advice.dps: If targeted, route the dash circle through bombs; if not, stay clear and keep cleaving.

advice.generic: Hulking Fragment hits the tank and applies a Magic DoT/puddle pattern; the tank should move out before dispel so the puddle drops away from melee.
advice.tank: Aim the hit away from allies, back away after the hit, and call for dispel once you are out of melee space.
advice.healer: Wait until the tank is out before dispelling so the puddle lands away from the group.
advice.dps: Give the tank room to move out; do not chase into the dispel puddle drop zone.

1280330.name: Rift Essence

advice.generic: Rift Essence increases Shadow damage taken; remove it before additional Shadow mechanics hit.
advice.healer: Magic dispel high-risk targets before Void Expulsion, Waves, or boss shadow damage.
advice.dps: Use self-dispel/racial if available and avoid extra shadow hits while debuffed.

1280330.notes: Magic debuff that increases Shadow damage taken; dispel before more Shadow damage.

1281636.name: Creeping Void
1281636.summary: A curse that increases Shadow damage taken until it is removed.

advice.generic: Creeping Void is a curse that increases Shadow damage taken; remove it before more shadow damage lands.
advice.healer: If your healer cannot remove curses, call for DPS curse utility.
advice.dps: Use curse removal on affected players quickly; this is not just healer responsibility.

1281636.notes: Curse that increases Shadow damage taken; remove before more Shadow damage lands.

advice.generic: Arcane Beam tracks/channels into a player and leaves puddles; guide it away from the group path and avoid the trail.
advice.tank: Keep enemies positioned so the beam target has a safe path out and melee are not boxed in.
advice.healer: Watch the beam target while they move; the danger is often beam plus knockback/other puddles.
advice.dps: If targeted, move the beam away from allies and avoid painting the group path.

1282055.name: Ethereal Shackles

advice.generic: Ethereal Shackles pins the target; remove it before overlapping movement mechanics.
advice.tank: If you are rooted, call for freedom/dispels before tank movement is required.
advice.healer: Prioritize dispel when the root would trap someone in Arcane Residue, beams, or knockbacks.
advice.dps: Break yourself out if your class can; do not wait in a lethal overlap.

1282055.notes: Magic root; dispel or root-break to avoid being pinned in mechanics.

1282244.name: Vile Bite

advice.generic: Vile Bite is tank bleed pressure; treat high stacks or overlaps as dangerous rather than normal melee damage.
advice.tank: Use defensives/active mitigation and kite if the bleed stacks are getting ahead of healing.
advice.healer: Track the bleed and use externals or heavy spot healing if no bleed cleanse is available.
advice.dps: Use bleed removal, stuns, or slows to reduce tank pressure where possible.

1282244.notes: Tank bleed; bleed-cleanse where available, else defensive.

advice.generic: Dusk Frights create fear zones; step out early and do not let the zones trap the interrupt path to Nullify.
advice.tank: Position mobs so fear zones do not cover the group’s kick/staging area.
advice.healer: Be ready for players who eat fear during Dark Beckoning or other pulse damage.
advice.dps: Avoid fear zones and keep your interrupt available for Nullify.

advice.generic: Defensive Protocol sends heat waves; dodge the waves while continuing to soak solar beams as assigned.
advice.tank: Keep Araknath in melee and face Fiery Smash away so wave dodging remains possible.
advice.healer: Top players before Supernova and spot heal beam soakers.
advice.dps: Dodge waves first; soak beams only when safe and assigned.

advice.generic: Cosmic Sting drops a puddle under the target; place it away from the center and away from linked movement paths.
advice.tank: Keep clones/boss positioned so puddles do not split the arena for melee.
advice.healer: Spot heal the target if puddle movement overlaps other boss focus damage.
advice.dps: If targeted, drop the puddle out of the way and return to cleave quickly.

1284627.name: Umbral Splinters

advice.generic: Umbral Splinters is a dangerous removable debuff; dispel promptly and use a personal if dispel is delayed.
advice.healer: Prioritize the target if the debuff overlaps group damage.
advice.dps: Use self-dispel/defensive utility if your class can answer it.

1284627.notes: Discovered from logs (cleared by Detox). Magic debuff; dispel promptly.
